# Danesh Mishra - Senior Cloud Architect

> Helping businesses ship scalable cloud solutions faster with AI-augmented development.

This is the WebMCP-enabled portfolio site for Danesh Mishra. AI agents can manage content on this site by editing data files and committing to the repository.

## Links
- Full details: https://danesm.github.io/llms-full.txt
- Home: https://danesm.github.io/
- Projects: https://danesm.github.io/projects
- Skills: https://danesm.github.io/skills
- Blog: https://danesm.github.io/blog
- Contact: https://danesm.github.io/contact
- Repository: https://github.com/danesm/danesm.github.io

## Agent Instructions

To update this site, an AI agent should:

1. Clone the repository: `git clone https://github.com/danesm/danesm.github.io.git`
2. Read `src/data/content-schema.json` for field definitions
3. Make changes to the appropriate file (see Content Paths below)
4. Validate changes against the schema
5. Commit and push to `main` — GitHub Actions will rebuild and deploy

### Content Paths
- **New blog post**: Create `src/content/blog/{slug}.md` with frontmatter (title, date, description, tags)
- **New project**: Append to the array in `src/data/projects.ts`
- **New testimonial**: Append to the array in `src/data/testimonials.ts`
- **New career entry**: Append to the array in `src/data/career.ts`
- **Update profile**: Edit `src/data/professional.ts`
- **Update skills**: Edit `src/data/skills.ts`

### Content Schema
See `src/data/content-schema.json` for JSON Schema definitions of all content types.

---

## Projects

### Family Tree AppSync Application
- **Category**: cloud | **Featured**: yes
- **Technologies**: AWS AppSync, React, Vite, DynamoDB, GraphQL, Terraform, TypeScript
- Demonstrates end-to-end cloud-native delivery: a managed GraphQL API via AWS AppSync provides real-time data synchronisation, DynamoDB delivers single-digit-millisecond reads at any scale, and Terraform ensures reproducible infrastructure across environments. The result is a zero-ops application that scales automatically while keeping monthly costs under $5 for typical usage.

### Portfolio Website
- **Category**: web | **Featured**: yes
- **Technologies**: Astro, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, GitHub Actions
- **Live**: https://danesm.github.io | **Repo**: https://github.com/danesm/danesm.github.io
- A high-performance portfolio site scoring 100 on Lighthouse across all categories. Built with Astro for zero-JavaScript static output, Tailwind CSS for rapid UI iteration, and GitHub Actions for continuous deployment. Serves as a reference architecture for static sites that need fast iteration cycles and near-instant page loads.

### ConfigData
- **Category**: data | **Featured**: no
- **Technologies**: Configuration Management
- **Repo**: https://github.com/danesm/ConfigData
- Configuration data repository for managing and organizing application configuration across environments.

### BIPLIST Sorter
- **Category**: other | **Featured**: no
- **Technologies**: Java
- **Repo**: https://github.com/danesm/BIPLISTSorter
- A utility tool for sorting IIB BIPLIST files, streamlining integration broker configuration management.

### Go Programming Projects
- **Category**: other | **Featured**: no
- **Technologies**: Go
- **Repo**: https://github.com/danesm/GoLangProjects
- A collection of Go programming projects exploring concurrency patterns, web services, and systems programming.

## Career History

### Senior Cloud Architect — Amazon Web Services (AWS)
- **Location**: United Kingdom | **Period**: 2020–Present
- Designing and delivering large-scale cloud solutions for enterprise customers across EMEA. Leading architecture reviews, building reference implementations, and driving adoption of serverless and container-based workloads.

### Cloud Architect — Amazon Web Services (AWS)
- **Location**: London, UK | **Period**: 2017–2020
- Partnered with financial services and media customers to design resilient, cost-optimised AWS architectures. Delivered migration strategies for legacy workloads and mentored teams on cloud-native development practices.

### Senior Integration Architect — IBM
- **Location**: Singapore | **Period**: 2014–2017
- Led integration architecture for banking and telecommunications clients across Asia-Pacific. Designed API management platforms and event-driven middleware solutions handling millions of daily transactions.

### Integration Consultant — IBM
- **Location**: New York, USA | **Period**: 2011–2014
- Delivered enterprise integration solutions for Fortune 500 clients in healthcare and retail. Specialised in IBM Integration Bus, MQ, and DataPower for high-throughput messaging and API gateway patterns.

### Software Engineer — IBM
- **Location**: Hursley, UK | **Period**: 2008–2011
- Developed middleware components for IBM WebSphere product suite. Contributed to performance testing frameworks and customer-facing tooling used across global delivery centres.

### Junior Software Developer — Logica (now CGI)
- **Location**: Reading, UK | **Period**: 2005–2008
- Built Java-based enterprise applications for public sector clients. Gained foundational experience in software delivery, agile practices, and client-facing consulting.

## Blog Posts

### WebSphere Application Server Introspection and Troubleshooting
- **Date**: 2018-03-15 | **Tags**: websphere, java, middleware
- **URL**: https://danesm.github.io/blog/was-introspection
- A practical guide to introspecting and troubleshooting WebSphere Application Server environments, covering key diagnostic tools and techniques.

### Essential Mac Keyboard Shortcuts for Developers
- **Date**: 2019-01-20 | **Tags**: mac, productivity, shortcuts
- **URL**: https://danesm.github.io/blog/mac-keyboard-shortcuts
- A curated collection of Mac keyboard shortcuts that boost developer productivity, from system navigation to terminal and IDE tricks.

### Getting Started with Git and GitHub
- **Date**: 2019-04-15 | **Tags**: git, github, tutorial
- **URL**: https://danesm.github.io/blog/git-github-basics
- A hands-on tutorial covering Git fundamentals and GitHub workflows, from your first commit to pull requests and branching strategies.

### Introduction to Linux Containers
- **Date**: 2019-08-10 | **Tags**: linux, containers, docker
- **URL**: https://danesm.github.io/blog/linux-containers
- Understanding Linux containers from the ground up — namespaces, cgroups, and how Docker builds on these primitives to simplify application deployment.

### Infrastructure as Code
- Terraform (expert), AWS CDK (advanced), CloudFormation (advanced)

### Programming Languages
- TypeScript (expert), JavaScript (expert), Python (advanced), Go (advanced), Java (advanced)

### Frontend Frameworks & Tools
- React (expert), Vite (advanced), Astro (advanced), Tailwind CSS (advanced), Next.js (intermediate)

### APIs & Data

### DevOps & Tools

## Services Offered

- **Cloud-Native Apps**: Scalable, serverless applications built on AWS from the ground up.
- **AI Process Automation**: Automate back-office workflows and business processes with AI.
- **Websites & Portfolios**: Beautiful, fast business websites and portfolio sites that convert.
- **Payment Integration**: Stripe, payment gateways, and e-commerce solutions wired in seamlessly.
- **App Modernization**: Migrate and modernize legacy apps to cloud-native architectures.
- **AI Chatbots & Agents**: Intelligent chatbots and AI agents that handle daily tasks for you.
- **Secure by Design**: Security-first architecture with compliance and best practices baked into every solution.
